hero.title: AdonERP
hero.description: Browse clear guides, product documentation, developer references, and workflow examples to help your team launch faster and run every business process with confidence.

preview.cardDescription: Company, apps, users, and workflow basics

categoriesSection.title: Find the right answer faster.
categoriesSection.description: Documentation is grouped by workflow so business teams, managers, and developers can move from problem to solution without confusion.

categories.title: Getting Started
categories.description: Install, configure, and launch your AdonERP workspace with guided setup steps.

categories.title: Apps & Modules
categories.description: Learn how CRM, Sales, Inventory, Accounting, HR, and Projects work together.

categories.title: User Management
categories.description: Configure teams, roles, access rights, approvals, and secure collaboration rules.

categories.title: Developer Docs
categories.description: Use APIs, webhooks, custom fields, integrations, and automation workflows.

categories.title: Security & Compliance
categories.description: Understand authentication, permissions, audit logs, backups, and data governance.

categories.title: Support Center
categories.description: Troubleshoot common issues and find best-practice answers from the support team.

popularSection.description: Start with the most-used documentation topics for daily business setup, team operations, reporting, and system administration.

popularDocs: Set up your company profile and workspace
Invite users and assign role-based permissions
Create products, variants, and inventory rules
Connect sales orders with invoices and payments
Build approval workflows for your team

developerSection.title: Connect AdonERP with your own tools.
developerSection.description: Use clean references and practical examples to integrate accounting, ecommerce, logistics, analytics, and internal automation systems.
developerSection.label: API Reference

developerSteps: Create an API key from your admin settings
Choose REST endpoints or webhook events
Map AdonERP objects with your external system
Test requests safely in a sandbox workspace

continueSection.title: One platform, many ways to learn.
continueSection.description: Move from documentation to guided lessons, training resources, and community knowledge whenever your team needs deeper support.
